title: Zombie Abomination: The Italian Zombie Movie - Part 1
original_title: Zombie Abomination: The Italian Zombie Movie - Part 1
overview: While investigating the death of his twin brother, a special forces veteran, a sexy psychic, an evil succubus, her oafish boyfriend, two mysterious aliens and the Michigan Militia inadvertently join forces in a landfill of the living dead.
